productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Maroon Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers. Give your formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper with a matt finish for absolute comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of useConcealed elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue to offer a snug, customised FitFabric inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortMidsoleCushioned leather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with strategically raised lugs that have horizontal and vertical grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard for added protection to the backfootshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
